topTopic.name: The Odyssey Box Office Surge
topTopic.why: Multiple independent headlines report Christopher Nolan's The Odyssey crossing ₹100 crore ($13.4M) in India and nearing $400M worldwide, dominating trade conversation with box-office records, IMAX re-release impact, and global haul milestones.

story.title: The Odyssey Box Office Surge in India
story.angle: Crosses ₹100 crore ($13.4M) at Indian box office in 7 days; fastest for a Hollywood tentpole in India.

story.title: The Odyssey Global Haul and IMAX Re-release
story.angle: Nears $400 million worldwide; IMAX 70 mm re-release drives strong returns at premium large-format venues.

story.title: The Odyssey Tops Global Box Office Charts
story.angle: Record-breaking haul surpasses regional releases; positions Nolan for strong awards-season positioning.

story.title: The Odyssey Streaming and Home Release Plans
story.angle: Warner Bros. strategizes streaming window and premium home formats amid strong theatrical tailwinds.

story.title: The Odyssey Cast and Crew Reactions Fuel Buzz
story.angle: On-set anecdotes and cast interviews amplify fan excitement and social engagement around the film.

story.title: Resident Evil New Trailer and Fan Reactions
story.angle: Zach Cregger's Resident Evil movie trailer packs franchise elements; fans debate fidelity to games.

story.title: Lil Wayne to Receive Hollywood Walk of Fame Star
story.angle: Lil Wayne honored in 2027 class; music and crossover cinema presence highlighted.
